name: Stack B + GPTQ-lite (Fixed Scale Clamp) + Depth Recurrence + 6-bit Packing
author: Rome-1
blurb: Stack B foundation (11L/512d/4096vocab/4xMLP) with three quantization contributions: (1) fix for GPTQ-lite scale clamp bug that wastes 90% of dynamic range, (2) 6-bit packing (4 int6 values -> 3 bytes = 25% payload reduction), (3) forced int8 for depth-recurrence shared layers where quantization error amplifies through reuse. Non-record: no 8xH100 run yet, validated on 1xH100 NVL (717 steps, undertrained).
